## Description

A clear description of the feature or enhancement.

## Problem It Solves

What problem would this solve? Who would benefit?

## Proposed Solution

How should this feature work?

## Example Usage

```bash
# Example: how would users interact with this feature?
codewash scan --new-option
```

## Alternatives Considered

Are there other ways to solve this problem?

## Additional Context

Any other context or related issues?
